text:
communications media, storage and delivery agent of information or data, also known as info media, information media, communications media, media, information medium, medium, media of communication, communication, communication media. Attributes include: 
- part of: "communication"
- Commons category: "Media"
- subclass of: "means (has use: communication)"
- has part(s): "matter",
 "means of communication"
- used by: "mass media",
 "information exchange"
- history of topic: "media history"
- studied by: "media history"
